recentAnalysis.title: We Won the Rankings. The Ecosystem Moved On.
recentAnalysis.summary: 17-month GSC + GA4 dataset documenting the zero-click search impact at a university. Rankings up 51%, CTR down 79%. ~1,200 leads/month lost to AI cannibalization.

recentAnalysis.title: Content Clusters Are Not What Most Teams Think They Are
recentAnalysis.summary: Why most pillar-and-cluster implementations fail — and what actually builds topical authority in 2026.

recentAnalysis.title: INP Replaced FID. Here Is What That Actually Means for Your Site.
recentAnalysis.summary: Practitioner-level INP debugging guide. Why INP is harder to fix than FID, and the right optimization process.

recentAnalysis.title: The Front Door for AI Agents (UAGC WebMCP)
recentAnalysis.summary: Executive brief for AI-agent-native web architecture at a university — dual-layer WebMCP with authorized tool access and honeypot defense.
